en: A SONG OF ASCENTS.Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD, who stand by night in the house of the LORD!
zh: 耶和華的眾僕人哪！ 你們要稱頌耶和華； 夜間在耶和華殿中侍候的， 你們要稱頌耶和華。

en: Lift up your hands to the holy place and bless the LORD!
zh: 你們要向聖所舉手禱告， 稱頌耶和華。

en: May the LORD bless you from Zion, he who made heaven and earth!
zh: 願造天地的耶和華， 從錫安賜福給你們。
